steps.title: Find the shared criticism
steps.content: Both texts argue that modernist scholarship is too narrow. Text 1 says fragmented narratives are overrepresented, while Text 2 says the focus on fragmentation versus coherence blocks attention to other stylistic patterns.

steps.title: State the shared warning
steps.content: B wrongly says style is overrepresented as a whole. C claims methods are becoming obsolete, which neither text says. D focuses on rehabilitating neglected works, a narrower concern than both texts share. Both authors warn that the field needs a broader focus. The answer is A.
